recommendations.issue: Finished products must have test results or Certificate of Analysis with parameters, results, and approval status
recommendations.reason: Released batches lack complete approved quality evidence.
recommendations.recommended_action: Investigate failed quality results, hold the released batch, and complete approved QA release evidence.

recommendations.issue: Deviations must be investigated and CAPA records must capture issue, root cause, corrective action, and closure status
recommendations.reason: No deviation record is fully closed with complete CAPA evidence.
recommendations.recommended_action: Close open deviations with documented CAPA effectiveness checks and QA approval.
evidence_reviewed: Temperature excursion in finished goods store for 3 hours

recommendations.issue: Finished product quality must be verified before release through approved COA or QC documentation
recommendations.reason: Released batches lack complete approved quality evidence.
recommendations.recommended_action: Block release for affected batches until QC evidence is approved and all failed tests are dispositioned.

recommendations.issue: Deviation events must be documented with CAPA and tracked to closure
recommendations.reason: No deviation record is fully closed with complete CAPA evidence.
recommendations.recommended_action: Track all deviation CAPAs to closure and block affected processes until closure criteria are met.
evidence_reviewed: Temperature excursion in finished goods store for 3 hours

recommendations.issue: Scheduled formulations must comply with notified NPPA ceiling price
recommendations.reason: All visible products breach or fail to prove NPPA ceiling compliance.
recommendations.recommended_action: Revise product MRPs to stay within NPPA ceiling price plus permitted adjustment and document the revision.

recommendations.issue: The marketed MRP must not exceed the applicable NPPA ceiling price after permitted adjustments
recommendations.reason: All visible products breach or fail to prove NPPA ceiling compliance.
recommendations.recommended_action: Freeze dispatch of products priced above the allowed ceiling until pricing is corrected.

recommendations.issue: Raw materials must come from approved vendors and meet defined specifications
recommendations.reason: Some vendors are not fully qualified or lack specifications.
recommendations.recommended_action: Complete vendor qualification for all raw material and packaging suppliers before further procurement.

recommendations.issue: Critical equipment must have calibration records with last calibration and next due date
recommendations.reason: Some equipment records are overdue or incomplete.
recommendations.recommended_action: Review overdue calibration items immediately and recalibrate or quarantine affected equipment.

recommendations.issue: Equipment used in production must be calibrated and maintained according to schedule
recommendations.reason: Some equipment records are overdue or incomplete.
recommendations.recommended_action: Bring all production and QC equipment back into calibration and document impact assessments.

recommendations.issue: Raw materials must be procured from qualified vendors and verified against specifications
recommendations.reason: Some vendors are not fully qualified or lack specifications.
recommendations.recommended_action: Approve or suspend suppliers that do not yet have complete qualification and specification evidence.

recommendations.issue: Inspection or review outcomes must capture the current compliance status of the facility or product
recommendations.reason: Inspection records show minor observations or conditional status.
recommendations.recommended_action: Address inspection observations and update readiness evidence before the next state inspection.

recommendations.issue: Storage conditions relevant to licensed products must be documented and reviewable
recommendations.reason: Some storage records are missing range, monitoring, or logs.
recommendations.recommended_action: Complete monitored storage controls for all batches, including range, monitoring system, and logs.
